docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER (FOR JUNE-20-2024 HEARING DATE) RETURNED. SENT TO: DEFENDANT - NELSON GONZALEZ. (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - UNABLE TO FORWARD) (RETURN MAIL FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 TO BE PLACED IN DOCKET FOR HEARING.)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, MARIBEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, NELSON $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $930.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-20-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-20-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF MARIBEL GONZALEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NELSON GONZALEZ IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAWN PAYNE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-06-2024 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO JUN-20-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARIBEL GONZALEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NELSON GONZALEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2024 - JUDGMENT.
